title: How to delete tags
excerpt: Is there a way to delete tags?  When I go into “manage”, I can click the pencil/edit and erase it, however, it STILL shows up in the tag list on the board.  It’s important to be able to totally delete misspelled tags or …

posts.author: destinygozero (Destiny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to delete tags? When I go into “manage”, I can click the pencil/edit and erase it, however, it STILL shows up in the tag list on the board. It’s important to be able to totally delete misspelled tags or old tags, as they tend to get VERY cluttered.

Thanks!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: If you have removed all occurrences or renamed any “incorrect” tags, you should just be able to refresh and the problem tag will no longer be a choice.
